text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Training is over, and I'm just about to start
cleaning up, when...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! We can't pack up yet! Today is Ten
Thousandfold Day. Didn't you know? ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The name symbolizes a single grain of rice
multiplying ten thousandfold!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's an extremely fortuitous day! ♪ If you pray for
your efforts to be rewarded ten thousandfold,
you'll find yourself blessed with super good luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And that's why today, Trainer, I want to keep
going with more training! ☆ You don't mind, do
you?
choice_data_list: All right then! Let's multiply our results!

How about taking a break and multiplying your
health benefits instead?

How about taking a break and multiplying your
health benefits instead?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And that's why today, Trainer, I want to keep
going with more training! ☆ You don't mind, do
you?
choice_data_list: All right then! Let's multiply our results!

How about taking a break and multiplying your
health benefits instead?

How about taking a break and multiplying your
health benefits instead?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪ I knew you'd understand, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: To multiply my results, I'm going to go all out!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Let's get right down to it! Rickey! ☆
Lucky! ☆ Ten thousandfold training! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see... Certainly! That's one way of thinking about
it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as today is a special day, I should show my
body some special appreciation.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I just remembered there's a foot bath at the
local bathhouse! How about we go and try it out?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is all about maintaining inner balance
and a healthy flow of qi. Since foot baths can
improve your circulation, they're perfect as a feng
shui remedy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go to the bathhouse! ♪
